channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: PM Shehbaz Sharif Holds Meeting with US Vice President JD Vance during US-Iran Peace Talks in Islamabad
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met US Vice President JD Vance in Islamabad on Saturday as high-level direct talks between the United States and Iran got under way. These historic negotiations, facilita...

item.title: FIFA confirms Iran will play 2026 World Cup group matches in the United States
item.description: Mexico President Claudia Sheinbaum don confirm say Iran national football team no go shift their 2026 FIFA World Cup matches from the United States to Mexico. She talk am for one press conference afte...

item.title: Ongoing uncertainty over the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz amid fragile Middle East ceasefire
item.description: The Strait of Hormuz, one of the world’s most vital shipping routes, remains largely paralysed despite Iran’s announcement that it has reopened the channel following weeks of conflict. Since the start...

item.title: Carter Gordon picks up knee injury after brilliant try helps Reds defeat Crusaders
item.description: Queensland Reds fly-half Carter Gordon produced one of Super Rugby’s most memorable tries before suffering a painful knee injury during his team’s 31–26 win over the Crusaders. Gordon’s dazzling effor...

item.title: Police detain two suspects after fatal stabbing in Primrose Hill, London
item.description: Two men have been arrested in connection with the fatal stabbing of a 21-year-old man in the Primrose Hill area of north London. According to initial reports, the Metropolitan Police responded to an i...

item.title: Money can increase happiness when used for financial security, experiences and free time
item.description: In this opinion piece, Eleanor Margolis challenges the common saying that money cannot buy happiness, arguing that it very much can when spent wisely, especially for those not already wealthy. With wa...

item.title: Police probe killing of Brian Muendo after bar fight in Nairobi
item.description: Police in Nairobi are investigating the mysterious death of a young man, Brian Muendo, who died after a violent confrontation at a bar in the city. The incident happened at a popular entertainment spo...

item.title: 8th Pay Commission invites applications for consultant positions with defined salary structure
item.description: The Central Government has initiated the recruitment process for consultant positions under the 8th Pay Commission, aiming to review and recommend changes in salaries, allowances, and pensions of cent...

item.title: Investment Opportunities in the Global Space Industry Following Artemis II
item.description: The global space industry is experiencing a significant resurgence, driven by major advancements and recent high-profile missions. NASA's Artemis II mission recently launched four astronauts further i...

item.title: EPRA Confirms Stable Fuel Supply Nationwide Despite Minor Depot Delays
item.description: The Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority (EPRA) has assured Kenyans that the country’s fuel reserves are stable despite global disruptions in oil supply caused by the Middle East conflict. Kenya ...

item.title: Life and Tensions in an Israeli Kibbutz Close to the Lebanon Border
item.description: At kibbutz Cabri in northern Israel, residents are living under constant threat due to ongoing hostilities between Israel and Hezbollah along the Lebanon border. Despite a reported ceasefire, air raid...

item.title: From Matatu Operator to Successful Mushroom Farmer in Kenya
item.description: During the Covid-19 pandemic, many Kenyan entrepreneurs were forced to rethink their livelihoods due to lockdowns and reduced economic activity. One such person was a former matatu operator who decide...

item.title: Djibouti President Guelleh Secures Sixth Term Amid Boycotted Election
item.description: Djibouti's President Ismael Omar Guelleh has secured a sixth term in office after winning 97.8 percent of the vote, according to state media. The 78-year-old leader, who succeeded his uncle in 1999, c...

item.title: Windsor police seek suspect after vandalism on Wyandotte Street East
item.description: Windsor Police Service is asking for the public's assistance in identifying a suspect involved in an alleged vandalism incident that occurred on March 27 in the 3800 block of Wyandotte Street East. Th...

item.title: Get on George euthanised at Aintree following injury; second Grand National festival fatality in two days
item.description: Get on George, a six-year-old gelding, was humanely euthanised at Aintree Racecourse after sustaining a broken near-hind fetlock during the William Hill Handicap Hurdle on Saturday. The incident marke...

item.title: Sant Rampal released on bail after 12 years; history of 2014 ashram siege recounted
item.description: Sant Rampal, the self-proclaimed preacher and head of Satlok Ashram in Hisar district, Haryana, has been released from jail this week after nearly twelve years of incarceration. His release follows th...

item.title: Young campaigners urge UK government to extend domestic abuse laws to include under-16s
item.description: James Stephen*, a 15-year-old boy, was unable to obtain justice under current UK domestic abuse legislation after suffering prolonged physical and psychological abuse from his girlfriend. Despite bein...

item.title: Alleged Social Media Posts Raise Questions About INEC Chairman's Neutrality
item.description: Fresh debate don burst for social media after claims say archived posts from an account wey dem dey associate with Prof. Joash Amupitan, the INEC Chairman, show support for APC during 2023 elections. ...

item.title: Creamline Cool Smashers secure first semifinals victory over PLDT High Speed Hitters
item.description: In a highly competitive match of the Premier Volleyball League (PVL), the Creamline Cool Smashers managed to overcome the PLDT High Speed Hitters in a thrilling five-set encounter. The game showcased ...

item.title: Simhachalam Temple Chandanotsavam 2026 tickets now available online from April 13
item.description: The Simhachalam Devasthanam has initiated an online ticket booking facility for the annual Chandanotsavam festival, which is celebrated at the Sri Varaha Lakshmi Narasimha Swamy Temple in Simhachalam....
